noveltyJustification: Prior finding 005 was confirmed with clearer separation between already wired manual graph-metadata causal links and missing deterministic parent/child/parentChain promotion.
findingsSummary: manual.depends_on/supersedes/related_to are already parsed and mapped to causal relations.
graph-metadata parent_id/children_ids and description parentChain remain deterministic but unpromoted.
createSpecDocumentChain is an intra-folder document-chain helper, not the metadata edge promoter.
